name: Celestial Dreams
description: Spring/Summer 2026 — Where the cosmos meets couture. Ethereal silhouettes in midnight hues, constellations captured in crystal, and fabrics that float like starlight.
descriptionZh: 2026春夏——当宇宙邂逅高定。午夜色调的空灵轮廓，水晶捕捉的星座，如星光般漂浮的面料。

name: Ombre & Lumière
description: Autumn/Winter 2026 — A study in contrast. Liquid metals meet forest textures. Sculptural forms emerge from shadow, illuminated by moonstone and gold.
descriptionZh: 2026秋冬——对比的研究。液态金属遇见森林肌理。雕塑般的形式从阴影中浮现，被月光石和黄金照亮。

name: Brides de Légende
description: Bridal Couture — For the woman who walks down the aisle as if she's entering legend. Architectural bows, eternal roses, and the purest white reimagined.
descriptionZh: 新娘高定——为走向红毯如同走入传奇的女性。建筑感蝴蝶结、永恒玫瑰，以及对最纯净的白的重新想象。
